'''ngapozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycobacteriostasis|mycobacteriostasis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-p-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycobacteriostasis|mycobacteriostasis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngapozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæpezheth|ngæpezheth]] || [[word:ngæpezhej|ngæpezhej]] || [[word:ngæpezhesh|ngæpezhesh]] || [[word:ngæpezhe|ngæpezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngapopozhoth|ngapopozhoth]] || [[word:ngapopozhoj|ngapopozhoj]] || [[word:ngapopozhosh|ngapopozhosh]] || [[word:ngapopozho|ngapopozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngapozhoth|ngapozhoth]] || [[word:ngapozhoj|ngapozhoj]] || [[word:ngapozhosh|ngapozhosh]] || [[word:ngapozho|ngapozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngapofzhoth|ngapofzhoth]] || [[word:ngapofzhoj|ngapofzhoj]] || [[word:ngapofzhosh|ngapofzhosh]] || [[word:ngapofzhof|ngapofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngapozhotho|ngapozhotho]] || [[word:ngapozhojo|ngapozhojo]] || [[word:ngapozhosho|ngapozhosho]] || [[word:ngapozhoko|ngapozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngapozhoth|ngapozhoth]] || [[word:ngapozhoj|ngapozhoj]] || [[word:ngapozhosh|ngapozhosh]] || [[word:ngapozho|ngapozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngapozhothol|ngapozhothol]] || [[word:ngapozhojol|ngapozhojol]] || [[word:ngapozhoshol|ngapozhoshol]] || [[word:ngapozhokol|ngapozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngapozhothotho|ngapozhothotho]] || [[word:ngapozhojojo|ngapozhojojo]] || [[word:ngapozhoshosho|ngapozhoshosho]] || [[word:ngapozhoko|ngapozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngapozhothon|ngapozhothon]] || [[word:ngapozhojon|ngapozhojon]] || [[word:ngapozhoshon|ngapozhoshon]] || [[word:ngapozhokon|ngapozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngapozhothoro|ngapozhothoro]] || [[word:ngapozhojoro|ngapozhojoro]] || [[word:ngapozhoshoro|ngapozhoshoro]] || [[word:ngapozhokoro|ngapozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
